## Summary

Describe the problem and the incremental solution.

## Verification

- [ ] `python manage.py check`
- [ ] `python manage.py makemigrations --check`
- [ ] `python manage.py test`
- [ ] Relevant manual workflow tested
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or configuration changed

## Security and data handling

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, production evidence, databases, or generated reports included
- [ ] New external input is validated at its trust boundary
- [ ] Logs do not expose submitted event data

## UI changes

Include before-and-after screenshots when applicable, using fictional or
sanitized data.
